x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Stockroom configuration enables Now Assist HAM to analyze inventory levels across locations and generate AI-powered procurement and redistribution recommendations. Without stockrooms, AI cannot determine where assets are physically located or identify stock imbalances.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function() { var ga = new GlideAggregate("alm_stockroom"); ga.addQuery("active", true); ga.addAggregate("COUNT"); ga.query(); var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (count >= 3) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: count + " active stockrooms configured", finding: count + " active stockrooms. Now Assist HAM has structured inventory locations for AI-powered stock level analysis and procurement recommendations." }; } else if (count >= 1) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: count + " active stockroom(s) configured", finding: "Only " + count + " active stockroom(s) (target: 3+). Now Assist HAM AI stock analysis may not cover all inventory locations." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "No active stockrooms configured", finding: "No active stockrooms configured. Now Assist HAM cannot perform AI inventory level analysis or generate procurement recommendations without stockroom data." }; } })
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure stockrooms for each physical location where hardware assets are stored. Navigate to Hardware Asset Management > Stockrooms to create and activate stockroom records.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_1e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851ccf
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <ai_justification><![CDATA[Stockroom configuration enables Now Assist HAM to analyze inventory levels across locations and generate AI-powered procurement and redistribution recommendations. Without stockrooms, AI cannot determine where assets are physically located or identify stock imbalances.]]></ai_justification> <check_name>Stockroom Configuration</check_name> <check_script><![CDATA[(function() { var ga = new GlideAggregate("alm_stockroom"); ga.addQuery("active", true); ga.addAggregate("COUNT"); ga.query(); var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; if (count >= 3) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: count + " active stockrooms configured", finding: count + " active stockrooms. Now Assist HAM has structured inventory locations for AI-powered stock level analysis and procurement recommendations." }; } else if (count >= 1) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: count + " active stockroom(s) configured", finding: "Only " + count + " active stockroom(s) (target: 3+). Now Assist HAM AI stock analysis may not cover all inventory locations." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: "No active stockrooms configured", finding: "No active stockrooms configured. Now Assist HAM cannot perform AI inventory level analysis or generate procurement recommendations without stockroom data." }; } })]]></check_script> <is_active>true</is_active> <is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive> <is_manual>false</is_manual> <module>HAM</module> <number>CHK0006240</number> <order>800</order> <remediation_guidance>Configure stockrooms for each physical location where hardware assets are stored. Navigate to Hardware Asset Management > Stockrooms to create and activate stockroom records.</remediation_guidance> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>1e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851ccf</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_updated_on> </x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
